name: Research Subject
description: Research a topic or answer questions using indexed sources (Candlekeep, Vectorless) without writing an article.

nodes.prompt: Ask the researcher their research question. Determine the type: direct question, topic exploration, source comparison, quote search, or concept analysis.

Spawn parallel search subagents: (1) research-rag: query Agentic-Search-Vectorless with mix/local/global modes as appropriate, (2) research-candlekeep: browse and read relevant Candlekeep items. Collect all results.

Aggregate results from all search subagents. Present a comprehensive answer with proper citations (author, work, page). Flag any gaps where sources are insufficient. Output in the researcher's targetLanguage.
